architecture.summary: Single React component change. CreateSkillInline.tsx in vskill eval-ui. No architecture changes needed -- backend POST /api/skills/generate with SSE already exists, api.generateSkill() client already exists, reference implementation exists in CreateSkillPage.tsx

integrations.summary: N/A - no new integrations. Uses existing /api/skills/generate endpoint and existing api.ts client methods. SSE streaming already implemented in backend.

ui-ux.summary: Replace passive banner with Manual/AI toggle, AI prompt textarea, generate button with model name, loading/progress state via SSE, collapsible reasoning section, inline error with retry. Reference impl exists in CreateSkillPage.tsx.

performance.summary: N/A - no performance concerns. SSE streaming already handles long-running generation. AbortController for cancellation already patterned in CreateSkillPage.

security.summary: N/A - local dev tool only (localhost). No auth, no external exposure. Prompt sent to existing LLM endpoint.

edge-cases.summary: Empty prompt validation, network errors during SSE streaming, abort/cancel mid-generation, malformed AI response, component unmount during generation. All patterns exist in CreateSkillPage.tsx reference.
